metadata.description: Investment banking slide template library for Claude Code. JSON spec → deterministic pixel rendering. Solves cross-model desync, openpyxl corruption, and spatial execution failures.

plugins.name: ib-deck-engine
plugins.description: 14-template IB slide library. Build pitch decks, football fields, financial summaries, sensitivity grids, sources & uses, trading comps via /ib-deck and friends.
